title: pleurothallis cymbiformis
intro: Pleurothallis cymbiformis, also known as the helmet orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the Pleurothallis genus, characterized by its unique helmet-shaped flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pleurothallis cymbiformis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
